caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white graphic, sits in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a black screen displaying the text "Johnson" in red and "Employee Only" in white. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners: a logo on the left reading "PODCAST" and "TALK 101" and a logo on the right reading "BOSS TALK 101" with "Kr 11 logo here" below it. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, shifting her facial expressions and head position slightly while gesturing with her right hand. Her mouth moves as she talks, and her gaze shifts slightly, though she remains seated in the same position throughout the clip.
